panels.description: Shows temperature conditions for the greenhouse.

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, temp_avg AS "Temp" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.title: Indoor Avg Temp

panels.description: Shows vapor pressure deficit, one of the most important plant-stress metrics.

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, vpd_avg AS "VPD" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.title: Indoor VPD
$/Day (30-Day Average)

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(AVG(cost_total)::numeric, 2) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE date >= current_date - interval '30 days' AND date < current_date AND cost_total > 0

panels.description: Average daily total cost across the last 30 completed daily summaries.
Daily cost stacked by utility type.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT (date + time '12:00')::timestamptz AS time, cost_electric AS "Electric"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date + time '12:00')::timestamptz) AND cost_total > 0 ORDER BY date

SELECT (date + time '12:00')::timestamptz AS time, cost_gas AS "Gas"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date + time '12:00')::timestamptz) AND cost_total > 0 ORDER BY date

SELECT (date + time '12:00')::timestamptz AS time, cost_water AS "Water"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date + time '12:00')::timestamptz) AND cost_total > 0 ORDER BY date

panels.title: Daily Cost by Type

panels.description: Greenhouse electrical load overlaid with available solar radiation. When solar is up, the greenhouse runs on sun.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('30 minutes', e.ts) AS time, round(avg(watts_total)::numeric, 0) AS "Greenhouse (W)" FROM energy e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('30 minutes', ts) AS time, round(avg(solar_irradiance_w_m2)::numeric, 0) AS "Solar (W/m²)" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Greenhouse Power vs Solar Irradiance

panels.description: Daily percent of samples inside the temperature band, VPD band, and both bands at the same time. Percent units only; no stress-hour scaling.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT (date + time '12:00')::timestamptz AS time,
       temp_compliance_pct AS "Temp Compliance %",
       vpd_compliance_pct AS "VPD Compliance %",
       compliance_pct AS "Total Compliance %"
FROM v_planner_performance
WHERE $__timeFilter((date + time '12:00')::timestamptz)
ORDER BY date

panels.title: Planner Compliance Trend — Temp, VPD, Total

panels.description: Daily hours outside the temperature band, outside the VPD band, and total stress hours. Hours are time, not percent, and are not scaled.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT (date + time '12:00')::timestamptz AS time,
       round((heat_stress_h + cold_stress_h)::numeric, 2) AS "Temp Stress Hours",
       round((vpd_high_stress_h + vpd_low_stress_h)::numeric, 2) AS "VPD Stress Hours",
       round(total_stress_h::numeric, 2) AS "Total Stress-Category Hours"
FROM v_planner_performance
WHERE $__timeFilter((date + time '12:00')::timestamptz)
ORDER BY date

panels.title: Planner Stress-Category Hours — Temp, VPD, Total

panels.description: Indoor temperature (15-sample rolling average; dashed = forecast) against the forecast-driven target band. The band widens on sunny days and narrows on cloudy days. Gray line shows outdoor temperature for context.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ts AS time,
    avg(temp_avg) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 14 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "Indoor Temp (15-sample rolling avg)"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND temp_avg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

(SELECT ts AS time, outdoor_temp_f AS "Outdoor Forecast"
 FROM climate WHERE outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
(SELECT DISTINCT ON (date_trunc('hour', ts))
     date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time,
     temp_f::float AS "Outdoor Forecast"
 FROM weather_forecast
 WHERE ts > now() AND ts < now() + interval '72 hours'
 ORDER BY date_trunc('hour', ts), fetched_at DESC)
ORDER BY time

WITH timeline AS (
    SELECT generate_series($__timeFrom(), $__timeTo(), interval '30 minutes') AS ts
)
SELECT t.ts AS time,
    (fn_band_setpoints(t.ts)).temp_low::float AS "Band Low",
    (fn_band_setpoints(t.ts)).temp_high::float AS "Band High"
FROM timeline t ORDER BY t.ts

SELECT ts AS time, outdoor_temp_f AS "Outdoor"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts
SELECT ts AS time, solar_irradiance_w_m2 AS "Solar W/m²" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

(SELECT ts AS time, solar_irradiance_w_m2 AS "Solar Forecast"
FROM climate WHERE solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
(SELECT DISTINCT ON (date_trunc('hour', ts))
    date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time, solar_w_m2 AS "Solar Forecast"
FROM weather_forecast WHERE ts > now() AND ts < now() + interval '72 hours'
ORDER BY date_trunc('hour', ts), fetched_at DESC)
ORDER BY time
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 82 ELSE NULL END AS "Fan 1" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='fan1' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 84 ELSE NULL END AS "Fan 2" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='fan2' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 86 ELSE NULL END AS "Fog" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='fog' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 58 ELSE NULL END AS "Heat 1" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='heat1' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 56 ELSE NULL END AS "Heat 2 (gas)" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='heat2' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Temperature vs Target Band

panels.description: Indoor VPD (30-sample rolling average; dashed = forecast) against the forecast-driven target band. The band widens when outdoor humidity is low. Gray line shows outdoor relative humidity for context.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ts AS time,
    avg(vpd_avg) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "Indoor VPD (30-sample rolling avg)"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND vpd_avg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

(SELECT ts AS time,
     (0.6108 * EXP(17.27 * ((outdoor_temp_f-32)/1.8) / (((outdoor_temp_f-32)/1.8)+237.3)) * (1.0 - outdoor_rh_pct/100.0))::float AS "Outdoor VPD Forecast"
 FROM climate WHERE outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL AND outdoor_rh_pct IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
(SELECT DISTINCT ON (date_trunc('hour', ts))
     date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time,
     vpd_kpa::float AS "Outdoor VPD Forecast"
 FROM weather_forecast
 WHERE ts > now() AND ts < now() + interval '72 hours'
 ORDER BY date_trunc('hour', ts), fetched_at DESC)
ORDER BY time

WITH timeline AS (
    SELECT generate_series($__timeFrom(), $__timeTo(), interval '30 minutes') AS ts
)
SELECT t.ts AS time,
    (fn_band_setpoints(t.ts)).vpd_low::float AS "Band Low",
    (fn_band_setpoints(t.ts)).vpd_high::float AS "Band High"
FROM timeline t ORDER BY t.ts

SELECT ts AS time,
    (0.6108 * EXP(17.27 * ((outdoor_temp_f-32)/1.8) / (((outdoor_temp_f-32)/1.8)+237.3)) * (1.0 - outdoor_rh_pct/100.0))::float AS "Outdoor VPD"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL AND outdoor_rh_pct IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 1.8 ELSE NULL END AS "Mister South" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='mister_south' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 1.9 ELSE NULL END AS "Mister West" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='mister_west' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 2.0 ELSE NULL END AS "Mister Center" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='mister_center' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 2.1 ELSE NULL END AS "Fog" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='fog' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.title: VPD vs Target Band

panels.description: Daily Light Integral accumulation vs crop target. Yellow background shows solar irradiance. Grow light state bars show when supplemental lighting is active.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, dli_today AS "DLI Today" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND dli_today IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT ts AS time, solar_irradiance_w_m2 AS "Solar Irradiance" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT generate_series($__timeFrom(), $__timeTo(), interval '1 hour') AS time, 14.0 AS "DLI Target"

(SELECT ts AS time, solar_irradiance_w_m2 AS "Solar Forecast"
FROM climate WHERE solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
(SELECT DISTINCT ON (date_trunc('hour', ts))
    date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time, solar_w_m2 AS "Solar Forecast"
FROM weather_forecast WHERE ts > now() AND ts < now() + interval '72 hours'
ORDER BY date_trunc('hour', ts), fetched_at DESC) ORDER BY time
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 1.0 ELSE NULL END AS "Grow Light Main" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='grow_light_main' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 0.5 ELSE NULL END AS "Grow Light Grow" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='grow_light_grow' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Light & DLI vs Target
